title: Banner Patch
description: Patches an issue with Forge 1.12.2 rendering where banners are given an improper render bounding box.
body:
Banner Patch is a simple mod that patches an issue with Forge 1.12.2 where Banners are given an improper render bounding box.

The improper render bounding box causes the top block of banners to disappear while they are still on your screen if the bottom block of the banner is off-screen, and vice-versa, depending on whether the banner is placed on the ground or on a wall.

This mod fixes this issue by simply overriding the Banner's bounding box and giving it a correctly sized one.

Banner Patch is client-side only and not required on servers, but shouldn't cause any issues if loaded on a server anyways.
